description: Command frontmatter is missing the required `name` field; without it the command cannot register in the plugin's slash-command list
suggested_fix: Add `name: setup-video-vision` to the YAML frontmatter block

description: Command frontmatter is missing the required `name` field; without it the command cannot register in the plugin's slash-command list
suggested_fix: Add `name: watch-video` to the YAML frontmatter block

description: Command body calls video_configure, video_setup, and video_watch but the frontmatter declares no allowed-tools; tool calls may be blocked in restricted permission modes
suggested_fix: Add `allowed-tools: [video_configure, video_setup, video_watch]` to the frontmatter

description: Command body calls video_info, video_analyze, video_watch, video_detail, and video_setup but the frontmatter declares no allowed-tools
suggested_fix: Add `allowed-tools: [video_info, video_analyze, video_watch, video_detail, video_setup]` to the frontmatter

description: Agent has no example blocks; readers and the framework cannot verify expected input/output behavior
suggested_fix: Add at least one example block showing a sample frame image input and its expected timestamped description output

description: Vague quantifier: 'concise but detailed' provides no objective measure for description length or depth
suggested_fix: Replace with a specific constraint, e.g., '1-3 sentences, max 60 words'

description: Vague quantifier: 'key objects' — no criteria given for which objects qualify as key vs. incidental
suggested_fix: Replace with 'foreground objects, objects the camera focuses on, or objects referenced in visible text'

description: Vague quantifier: 'a brief summary of the results' — no scope, length, or content criteria defined
suggested_fix: Specify: 'a 2-3 sentence summary covering video duration, content detected, and any processing errors'

description: Vague quantifier: 'keep it concise' — unenforceable without a concrete length or detail target
suggested_fix: Replace with 'limit explanations to one sentence per step'

description: Command requires a video path but provides no instruction for what to do when the user invokes it with no arguments
suggested_fix: Add an empty-input guard: 'If no video path is provided, respond: Please provide a video file path or YouTube URL to analyze.'

description: Vague quantifier: 'plan smart frame extraction' — 'smart' is undefined and gives the model no actionable criteria
suggested_fix: Replace with 'plan frame extraction focused on timestamps with scene changes, motion peaks, or speech references'

description: Vague quantifier: 'give a comprehensive summary' — no coverage criteria or length guidance
suggested_fix: Replace with 'give a structured summary: opening content, key events in chronological order, and closing content'

description: Vague quantifier: 'make smart extraction decisions' — undefined standard for decision quality
suggested_fix: Replace with 'use analysis data to target high-activity timestamps and skip low-motion segments'

description: Vague quantifier: 'Select filters relevant to the user's question' — relevance is implicit; the lookup table below partially resolves this but the prose itself is vague
suggested_fix: Replace prose with 'Select filters using the table below; when intent is unclear use scene_changes, silence, transcription'

description: Vague quantifier: 'if the initial view is insufficient' — no threshold or failure criteria defined
suggested_fix: Replace with 'if you cannot identify the subject, action, or text from the sampled frames'

description: Vague quantifier: 'form a complete understanding' — completeness cannot be verified or enforced
suggested_fix: Replace with 'cross-reference all sources before answering; note any gaps if audio or frames are missing'

description: npx -y claude-video-vision@latest auto-installs the unversioned @latest npm tag on every MCP server startup; a supply-chain compromise of the package or a breaking update is immediately trusted and executed
suggested_fix: Pin to a specific version: "args": ["-y", "claude-video-vision@1.3.1"] and update intentionally on each release

description: Production dependencies @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, zod, @google/genai, and openai all use ^ semver ranges, permitting unreviewed minor and patch updates
suggested_fix: Pin to exact versions or commit package-lock.json and enforce lock-file integrity in CI

description: plugin.json declares version 1.2.0 but mcp-server/package.json is at 1.3.1; marketplace listings will show an outdated version while users receive newer code via the @latest npx install
suggested_fix: Synchronize plugin.json version with mcp-server/package.json as part of the release process; consider a single source of truth (e.g., read version from package.json at publish time)
